model_name: XGBoost Model B — Two-stage fatigue residual model

stage1.purpose: Estimate baseline expected next-match rating using context-only features.

stage2.purpose: Predict below-expected next-match performance from fatigue, workload, recovery, physical-burden, and injury-context features.
stage2.threshold_note: best_thr_s2 was selected on the test set in this notebook; use as diagnostic only.

notes: Stage 2 models residual underperformance using fatigue/workload features.
Direct current-match performance-event variables are excluded from Stage 2.
This two-stage version is useful for methodology, but final recommended model is Model B v4b_no_competition.
